starry_unigraph.tasks package

class starry_unigraph.tasks.BaseTaskAdapter[source]

Bases: object

Base class for task adapters. Subclass for specific tasks.

build_sample_config(chunk: Any, model: Any, split: str) → SampleConfig[source]

Build sampling config. Override in subclass.

compute_loss(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Tensor[source]

Compute loss. Override in subclass.

compute_loss_old_api(output: Dict[str, Any]) → float[source]

Old API: extract loss from output dict directly. This is called if new compute_loss() fails.

compute_metrics(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Dict[str, float][source]

Compute evaluation metrics. Override in subclass.

format_output(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Format output for logging/saving. Default: return model_output.

format_prediction(output: Dict[str, Any]) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Old API: format prediction. Kept for backward compatibility.

task_type = 'base'
class starry_unigraph.tasks.EdgePredictAdapter[source]

Bases: BaseTaskAdapter

Adapter for temporal edge/link prediction task.

Samples positive and negative edge pairs, computes BCE loss, and computes AUC/AP metrics.

build_sample_config(chunk: Any, model: Any, split: str) → SampleConfig[source]

For edge prediction, return positive edges to sample from the chunk.

Args:

chunk: ChunkAtomic with tcsr_col, tcsr_ts, tcsr_edge_id model: Model instance (unused for now) split: Data split

Returns:

SampleConfig with pos_src/pos_dst for all edges in chunk

compute_loss(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Tensor[source]

Compute binary cross-entropy loss for edge prediction.

Args:

model_output: {‘pos_score’: [M], ‘neg_score’: [M*neg_ratio]} batch: BatchData (unused in this implementation)

Returns:

Scalar loss

compute_metrics(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Dict[str, float][source]

Compute AUC and AP metrics.

Args:

model_output: {‘pos_score’: [M], ‘neg_score’: [M*neg_ratio]} batch: BatchData

Returns:

{‘auc’: float, ‘ap’: float}

format_output(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Format edge predictions.

task_type = 'edge_predict'
class starry_unigraph.tasks.NodeClassifyAdapter[source]

Bases: BaseTaskAdapter

Adapter for node classification task.

Predicts discrete class labels for nodes. Uses cross-entropy loss and accuracy metrics.

build_sample_config(chunk: Any, model: Any, split: str) → SampleConfig[source]

For node classification, sample neighbors of labeled nodes.

Args:

chunk: ChunkAtomic with node_set and optional labeled node info model: Model instance split: Data split

Returns:

SampleConfig with target_nodes/target_labels

compute_loss(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Tensor[source]

Compute cross-entropy loss for node classification.

Args:

model_output: {‘logits’: [N, num_classes]} batch: BatchData with labels (class indices)

Returns:

Scalar cross-entropy loss

compute_metrics(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Dict[str, float][source]

Compute accuracy and other metrics for node classification.

Args:

model_output: {‘logits’: [N, num_classes]} batch: BatchData with labels

Returns:

{‘accuracy’: float}

format_output(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Format node classification predictions.

task_type = 'node_classification'
class starry_unigraph.tasks.NodeRegressionTaskAdapter[source]

Bases: BaseTaskAdapter

Adapter for node regression task.

Predicts continuous values (e.g., node features) for labeled nodes. Uses MSE loss and MAE/RMSE metrics.

build_sample_config(chunk: Any, model: Any, split: str) → SampleConfig[source]

For node regression, sample neighbors of labeled nodes.

Args:

chunk: ChunkAtomic with node_set and optional labeled node info model: Model instance split: Data split

Returns:

SampleConfig with target_nodes/target_labels

compute_loss(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Tensor[source]

Compute MSE loss for node regression.

Args:

model_output: {‘node_pred’: [N, feat_dim]} batch: BatchData with labels

Returns:

Scalar MSE loss

compute_metrics(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Dict[str, float][source]

Compute MAE and RMSE metrics for node regression.

Args:

model_output: {‘node_pred’: [N, feat_dim]} batch: BatchData with labels

Returns:

{‘mae’: float, ‘rmse’: float}

format_output(model_output: Dict[str, Tensor], batch: BatchData) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Format node predictions.

task_type = 'node_regression'
starry_unigraph.tasks.TemporalLinkPredictionTaskAdapter

alias of EdgePredictAdapter
